error_signature: CORS issue with trailing slash in domain
title: CORS issue due to trailing slash in domain
symptom: Requests to Xano fail due to CORS policy when a trailing slash is present in the domain. Users are unable to access data from Weweb.
applies_when: CORS settings include a domain with a trailing slash
not_this_if: CORS settings do not include a trailing slash
root_cause: Xano's CORS configuration does not accept domains with a trailing slash, which leads to failed requests. The change in Weweb's editor URL structure exacerbates this issue.
fix_steps: Remove the trailing slash from the domain in the CORS settings
agent_instruction: Remove the trailing slash from the CORS domain settings in Xano.
